case_title: PRESTON, DERBY L. VS CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,747.88 FILED BY PRESTON, DERBY L. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
